modules.title: HOO-HA!
modules.message: Hoo-Ha!  Bop Bip Bop, man!  Like it was the day after easter, things are sweet!Shame I still can't do very good beats!quite cool when it gets going though!  Ooooold Skoooool!I've learned some new tricks with the thingies and that too.swithseptember 2004

modules.message: well, its catchy!  I mean it might not go well in the game, its another 'epic' o
